description: Backend role closely aligned with existing Node.js and API strengths
jobDescription: Senior backend engineer role building Node.js APIs, improving observability, and mentoring engineers.

reasons: Strong Node and API delivery history
Clear focus on reliability and observability
modelResponse.suggestedMessage: Thanks for sharing this role. My strongest experience is building and operating Node APIs with strong observability practices, and this looks like a strong match.

description: Mostly aligned role with a meaningful domain gap
jobDescription: Platform engineer role with Kubernetes and Terraform ownership. Some Node.js service work.

reasons: Good overlap on backend service development in Node
Can contribute to platform reliability work
mismatches: Kubernetes depth is not a core strength today
Terraform ownership appears to be a ramp-up area
modelResponse.suggestedMessage: I can add value quickly on backend platform reliability work, and I want to be transparent that deep Kubernetes and Terraform ownership is currently a growth area for me.

description: Role is heavily focused on an explicit known gap
jobDescription: Senior iOS engineer building native Swift mobile apps with UIKit and SwiftUI.

reasons: Primary background is backend and web systems rather than native iOS
This role centers on Swift and iOS frameworks
mismatches: Native iOS app development is an explicit gap
Swift is not a current strength
modelResponse.suggestedMessage: I want to be direct: this role is centered on native iOS and Swift, which are not my core strengths, so I am likely not the right fit for this position.
